description: Zelda recreation inside Terraria — 9 dungeons, 4-player co-op, Zelda-universe NPCs, puzzles, parkour, boss arenas. 288K downloads.

world.name: A Link to Terraria
world.notes: Vanilla 1.4.4.9, no mods required. Version 4.0.5. AGPLv3 license. CurseForge CDN blocks automated download — manual download from https://www.curseforge.com/terraria/maps/a-link-to-terraria/download/4145198
